--- graph_table_match_columns.sql
SELECT name, number FROM GRAPH_TABLE (FinGraph MATCH (n:Person) COLUMNS (n.name AS name, 1 AS number))

--- AST
&ast.QueryStatement{
  Query: &ast.Select{
    Results: []ast.SelectItem{
      &ast.ExprSelectItem{
        Expr: &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 7,
          NameEnd: 11,
          Name:    "name",
        },
      },
      &ast.ExprSelectItem{
        Expr: &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 13,
          NameEnd: 19,
          Name:    "number",
        },
      },
    },
    From: &ast.From{
      From:   20,
      Source: &ast.GraphTableExpr{
        GraphTable: 25,
        RParen:     101,
        GraphName:  &ast.Path{
          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 38,
              NameEnd: 46,
              Name:    "FinGraph",
            },
          },
        },
        Query: &ast.GraphTableMatch{
          Match: &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    47,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  53,
                          Rparen:  62,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 54,
                              NameEnd: 55,
                              Name:    "n",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 55,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 56,
                                  NameEnd: 62,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          Columns: &ast.GraphTableColumns{
            Columns: 64,
            RParen:  100,
            Items:   []ast.SelectItem{
              &ast.Alias{
                Expr: &ast.Path{
                  Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                    &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 73,
                      NameEnd: 74,
                      Name:    "n",
                    },
                    &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 75,
                      NameEnd: 79,
                      Name:    "name",
                    },
                  },
                },
                As: &ast.AsAlias{
                  As:    80,
                  Alias: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 83,
                    NameEnd: 87,
                    Name:    "name",
                  },
                },
              },
              &ast.Alias{
                Expr: &ast.IntLiteral{
                  ValuePos: 89,
                  ValueEnd: 90,
                  Base:     10,
                  Value:    "1",
                },
                As: &ast.AsAlias{
                  As:    91,
                  Alias: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 94,
                    NameEnd: 100,
                    Name:    "number",
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
SELECT name, number FROM GRAPH_TABLE(FinGraph MATCH (n:Person) COLUMNS(n.name AS name, 1 AS number))
